sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ONEOK (NYSE:OKE) Has Announced That It Will Be Increasing Its Dividend To $1.07
feed.summary: ONEOK (NYSE:OKE) has declared an increased dividend of $1.07, raising the yield to 5.5%, which is above the industry average. While the company's dividend payouts are a high percentage of earnings and free cash flow, projected EPS growth suggests the payout ratio could become more comfortable. However, despite a solid track record of dividend payments and strong EPS growth, the article suggests the dividend might lack growth and could be unsustainable for investors focused on income.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries, Inc. (NYSE:MHK) Shares Could Be 23% Below Their Intrinsic Value Estimate
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries (NYSE: MHK) appears to be undervalued by approximately 23% according to Simply Wall St's discounted cash flow (DCF) model, with an estimated fair value of US$156 compared to its current share price of US$121. The analysis utilizes a two-stage growth model, forecasting future cash flows over ten years and incorporating a terminal value. This valuation suggests the stock is trading below its intrinsic worth, acknowledging that the DCF model is assumption-dependent and recommends further investigation into risks and future earnings.
